turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh hello. Main ek new patient hoon. Kisi doctor se refer kiya gaya hoon yahan — Dr. Jog ke paas, urology ke liye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka swagat hai! New patient registration simple hai. Aapka naam aur contact number please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Kashinath ji. Dr. Kishore Jog urology mein hain. Unka next slot hai Budhwaar 11 AM. Chalega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Book ho gaya. New patient hone ke naate please 15 minute pehle aana — registration complete karni hogi. Referral letter bhi saath laana. SMS aayega. Kuch aur?
